Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2:  * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more\\n3:  * contributor license agreements. See the NOTICE file distributed with\\n4:  * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.\\n5:  * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0\\n6:  * (the \\\"License\\\"); you may not use this file except in compliance with\\n7:  * the License. You may obtain a copy of the License at\\n8:  *\\n9:  *    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n10:  *\\n11:  * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\n12:  * distributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\n13:  * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\n14:  * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\n15:  * limitations under the License.\\n16:  */\\n17: package org.apache.kafka.common.record.internal;\\n18: \\n19: import org.apache.kafka.common.InvalidRecordException;\\n20: import org.apache.kafka.common.KafkaException;\\n21: import org.apache.kafka.common.compress.Compression;\\n22: import org.apache.kafka.common.errors.CorruptRecordException;\\n23: import org.apache.kafka.common.header.Header;\\n24: import org.apache.kafka.common.record.TimestampType;\\n25: import org.apache.kafka.common.utils.BufferSupplier;\\n26: import org.apache.kafka.common.utils.ByteBufferOutputStream;\\n27: import org.apache.kafka.common.utils.ByteUtils;\\n28: import org.apache.kafka.common.utils.CloseableIterator;\\n29: import org.apache.kafka.common.utils.Crc32C;\\n30: \\n31: import java.io.IOException;\\n32: import java.io.InputStream;\\n33: import java.nio.BufferUnderflowException;\\n34: import java.nio.ByteBuffer;\\n35: import java.util.ArrayList;\\n36: import java.util.Collections;\\n37: import java.util.Iterator;\\n38: import java.util.List;\\n39: import java.util.NoSuchElementException;\\n40: import java.util.Objects;\\n41: import java.util.OptionalLong;\\n42: \\n43: import static org.apache.kafka.common.record.internal.Records.LOG_OVERHEAD;\\n44: \\n45: /**\\n46:  * RecordBatch implementation for magic 2 and above. The schema is given below:\\n47:  *\\n48:  * RecordBatch =>\\n49:  *  BaseOffset => Int64\\n50:  *  Length => Int32\\n51:  *  PartitionLeaderEpoch => Int32\\n52:  *  Magic => Int8\\n53:  *  CRC => Uint32\\n54:  *  Attributes => Int16\\n55:  *  LastOffsetDelta => Int32 // also serves as LastSequenceDelta\\n56:  *  BaseTimestamp => Int64\\n57:  *  MaxTimestamp => Int64\\n58:  *  ProducerId => Int64\\n59:  *  ProducerEpoch => Int16\\n60:  *  BaseSequence => Int32\\n61:  *  RecordsCount => Int32\\n62:  *  Records => [Record]\\n63:  *\\n64:  * Note that when compression is enabled (see attributes below), the compressed record data is serialized\\n65:  * directly following the count of the number of records.\\n66:  *\\n67:  * The CRC covers the data from the attributes to the end of the batch (i.e. all the bytes that follow the CRC). It is\\n68:  * located after the magic byte, which means that clients must parse the magic byte before deciding how to interpret\\n69:  * the bytes between the batch length and the magic byte. The partition leader epoch field is not included in the CRC\\n70:  * computation to avoid the need to recompute the CRC when this field is assigned for every batch that is received by\\n71:  * the broker. The CRC-32C (Castagnoli) polynomial is used for the computation.\\n72:  *\\n73:  * On Compaction: Unlike the older message formats, magic v2 and above preserves the first and last offset/sequence\\n74:  * numbers from the original batch when the log is cleaned. This is required in order to be able to restore the\\n75:  * producer's state when the log is reloaded. If we did not retain the last sequence number, then following\\n76:  * a partition leader failure, once the new leader has rebuilt the producer state from the log, the next sequence\\n77:  * expected number would no longer be in sync with what was written by the client. This would cause an\\n78:  * unexpected OutOfOrderSequence error, which is typically fatal. The base sequence number must be preserved for\\n79:  * duplicate checking: the broker checks incoming Produce requests for duplicates by verifying that the first and\\n80:  * last sequence numbers of the incoming batch match the last from that producer.\\n81:  *\\n82:  * Note that if all of the records in a batch are removed during compaction, the broker may still retain an empty\\n83:  * batch header in order to preserve the producer sequence information as described above. These empty batches\\n84:  * are retained only until either a new sequence number is written by the corresponding producer or the producerId\\n85:  * is expired from lack of activity.\\n86:  *\\n87:  * There is no similar need to preserve the timestamp from the original batch after compaction. The BaseTimestamp\\n88:  * field therefore reflects the timestamp of the first record in the batch in most cases. If the batch is empty, the\\n89:  * BaseTimestamp will be set to -1 (NO_TIMESTAMP). If the delete horizon flag is set to 1, the BaseTimestamp\\n90:  * will be set to the time at which tombstone records and aborted transaction markers in the batch should be removed.\\n91:  *\\n92:  * Similarly, the MaxTimestamp field reflects the maximum timestamp of the current records if the timestamp type\\n93:  * is CREATE_TIME. For LOG_APPEND_TIME, on the other hand, the MaxTimestamp field reflects the timestamp set\\n94:  * by the broker and is preserved after compaction. Additionally, the MaxTimestamp of an empty batch always retains\\n95:  * the previous value prior to becoming empty.\\n96:  *\\n97:  * The current attributes are given below:\\n98:  *\\n99:  *  ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n100:  *  | Unused (7-15) | Delete Horizon Flag (6) | Control (5) | Transactional (4) | Timestamp Type (3) | Compression Type (0-2) |\\n101:  *  ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n102:  */\\n103: public class DefaultRecordBatch extends AbstractRecordBatch implements MutableRecordBatch {\\n104:     static final int BASE_OFFSET_OFFSET = 0;\\n105:     static final int BASE_OFFSET_LENGTH = 8;\\n106:     static final int LENGTH_OFFSET = BASE_OFFSET_OFFSET + BASE_OFFSET_LENGTH;\\n107:     static final int LENGTH_LENGTH = 4;\\n108:     static final int PARTITION_LEADER_EPOCH_OFFSET = LENGTH_OFFSET + LENGTH_LENGTH;\\n109:     static final int PARTITION_LEADER_EPOCH_LENGTH = 4;\\n110:     static final int MAGIC_OFFSET = PARTITION_LEADER_EPOCH_OFFSET + PARTITION_LEADER_EPOCH_LENGTH;\\n111:     static final int MAGIC_LENGTH = 1;\\n112:     public static final int CRC_OFFSET = MAGIC_OFFSET + MAGIC_LENGTH;\\n113:     static final int CRC_LENGTH = 4;\\n114:     static final int ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET = CRC_OFFSET + CRC_LENGTH;\\n115:     static final int ATTRIBUTE_LENGTH = 2;\\n116:     public static final int LAST_OFFSET_DELTA_OFFSET = ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET + ATTRIBUTE_LENGTH;\\n117:     static final int LAST_OFFSET_DELTA_LENGTH = 4;\\n118:     static final int BASE_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET = LAST_OFFSET_DELTA_OFFSET + LAST_OFFSET_DELTA_LENGTH;\\n119:     static final int BASE_TIMESTAMP_LENGTH = 8;\\n120:     static final int MAX_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET = BASE_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET + BASE_TIMESTAMP_LENGTH;\\n121:     static final int MAX_TIMESTAMP_LENGTH = 8;\\n122:     static final int PRODUCER_ID_OFFSET = MAX_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET + MAX_TIMESTAMP_LENGTH;\\n123:     static final int PRODUCER_ID_LENGTH = 8;\\n124:     static final int PRODUCER_EPOCH_OFFSET = PRODUCER_ID_OFFSET + PRODUCER_ID_LENGTH;\\n125:     static final int PRODUCER_EPOCH_LENGTH = 2;\\n126:     static final int BASE_SEQUENCE_OFFSET = PRODUCER_EPOCH_OFFSET + PRODUCER_EPOCH_LENGTH;\\n127:     static final int BASE_SEQUENCE_LENGTH = 4;\\n128:     public static final int RECORDS_COUNT_OFFSET = BASE_SEQUENCE_OFFSET + BASE_SEQUENCE_LENGTH;\\n129:     static final int RECORDS_COUNT_LENGTH = 4;\\n130:     static final int RECORDS_OFFSET = RECORDS_COUNT_OFFSET + RECORDS_COUNT_LENGTH;\\n131:     public static final int RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD = RECORDS_OFFSET;\\n132: \\n133:     private static final byte COMPRESSION_CODEC_MASK = 0x07;\\n134:     private static final byte TRANSACTIONAL_FLAG_MASK = 0x10;\\n135:     private static final int CONTROL_FLAG_MASK = 0x20;\\n136:     private static final byte DELETE_HORIZON_FLAG_MASK = 0x40;\\n137:     private static final byte TIMESTAMP_TYPE_MASK = 0x08;\\n138: \\n139:     private final ByteBuffer buffer;\\n140: \\n141:     DefaultRecordBatch(ByteBuffer buffer) {\\n142:         this.buffer = buffer;\\n143:     }\\n144: \\n145:     @Override\\n146:     public byte magic() {\\n147:         return buffer.get(MAGIC_OFFSET);\\n148:     }\\n149: \\n150:     @Override\\n151:     public void ensureValid() {\\n152:         if (sizeInBytes() < RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD)\\n153:             throw new CorruptRecordException(\\\"Record batch is corrupt (the size \\\" + sizeInBytes() +\\n154:                     \\\" is smaller than the minimum allowed overhead \\\" + RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD + \\\")\\\");\\n155: \\n156:         if (!isValid())\\n157:             throw new CorruptRecordException(\\\"Record is corrupt (stored crc = \\\" + checksum()\\n158:                     + \\\", computed crc = \\\" + computeChecksum() + \\\")\\\");\\n159:     }\\n160: \\n161:     /**\\n162:      * Gets the base timestamp of the batch which is used to calculate the record timestamps from the deltas.\\n163:      *\\n164:      * @return The base timestamp\\n165:      */\\n166:     public long baseTimestamp() {\\n167:         return buffer.getLong(BASE_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET);\\n168:     }\\n169: \\n170:     @Override\\n171:     public long maxTimestamp() {\\n172:         return buffer.getLong(MAX_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET);\\n173:     }\\n174: \\n175:     @Override\\n176:     public TimestampType timestampType() {\\n177:         return (attributes() & TIMESTAMP_TYPE_MASK) == 0 ? TimestampType.CREATE_TIME : TimestampType.LOG_APPEND_TIME;\\n178:     }\\n179: \\n180:     @Override\\n181:     public long baseOffset() {\\n182:         return buffer.getLong(BASE_OFFSET_OFFSET);\\n183:     }\\n184: \\n185:     @Override\\n186:     public long lastOffset() {\\n187:         return baseOffset() + lastOffsetDelta();\\n188:     }\\n189: \\n190:     @Override\\n191:     public long producerId() {\\n192:         return buffer.getLong(PRODUCER_ID_OFFSET);\\n193:     }\\n194: \\n195:     @Override\\n196:     public short producerEpoch() {\\n197:         return buffer.getShort(PRODUCER_EPOCH_OFFSET);\\n198:     }\\n199: \\n200:     @Override\\n201:     public int baseSequence() {\\n202:         return buffer.getInt(BASE_SEQUENCE_OFFSET);\\n203:     }\\n204: \\n205:     private int lastOffsetDelta() {\\n206:         return buffer.getInt(LAST_OFFSET_DELTA_OFFSET);\\n207:     }\\n208: \\n209:     @Override\\n210:     public int lastSequence() {\\n211:         int baseSequence = baseSequence();\\n212:         if (baseSequence == RecordBatch.NO_SEQUENCE)\\n213:             return RecordBatch.NO_SEQUENCE;\\n214:         return incrementSequence(baseSequence, lastOffsetDelta());\\n215:     }\\n216: \\n217:     @Override\\n218:     public CompressionType compressionType() {\\n219:         return CompressionType.forId(attributes() & COMPRESSION_CODEC_MASK);\\n220:     }\\n221: \\n222:     @Override\\n223:     public int sizeInBytes() {\\n224:         return LOG_OVERHEAD + buffer.getInt(LENGTH_OFFSET);\\n225:     }\\n226: \\n227:     private int count() {\\n228:         return buffer.getInt(RECORDS_COUNT_OFFSET);\\n229:     }\\n230: \\n231:     @Override\\n232:     public Integer countOrNull() {\\n233:         return count();\\n234:     }\\n235: \\n236:     @Override\\n237:     public void writeTo(ByteBuffer buffer) {\\n238:         buffer.put(this.buffer.duplicate());\\n239:     }\\n240: \\n241:     @Override\\n242:     public void writeTo(ByteBufferOutputStream outputStream) {\\n243:         outputStream.write(this.buffer.duplicate());\\n244:     }\\n245: \\n246:     @Override\\n247:     public boolean isTransactional() {\\n248:         return (attributes() & TRANSACTIONAL_FLAG_MASK) > 0;\\n249:     }\\n250: \\n251:     private boolean hasDeleteHorizonMs() {\\n252:         return (attributes() & DELETE_HORIZON_FLAG_MASK) > 0;\\n253:     }\\n254: \\n255:     @Override\\n256:     public OptionalLong deleteHorizonMs() {\\n257:         if (hasDeleteHorizonMs())\\n258:             return OptionalLong.of(buffer.getLong(BASE_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET));\\n259:         else\\n260:             return OptionalLong.empty();\\n261:     }\\n262: \\n263:     @Override\\n264:     public boolean isControlBatch() {\\n265:         return (attributes() & CONTROL_FLAG_MASK) > 0;\\n266:     }\\n267: \\n268:     @Override\\n269:     public int partitionLeaderEpoch() {\\n270:         return buffer.getInt(PARTITION_LEADER_EPOCH_OFFSET);\\n271:     }\\n272: \\n273:     public InputStream recordInputStream(BufferSupplier bufferSupplier) {\\n274:         final ByteBuffer buffer = this.buffer.duplicate();\\n275:         buffer.position(RECORDS_OFFSET);\\n276:         return Compression.of(compressionType()).build().wrapForInput(buffer, magic(), bufferSupplier);\\n277:     }\\n278: \\n279:     private CloseableIterator<Record> compressedIterator(BufferSupplier bufferSupplier, boolean skipKeyValue) {\\n280:         final InputStream inputStream = recordInputStream(bufferSupplier);\\n281: \\n282:         if (skipKeyValue) {\\n283:             return new StreamRecordIterator(inputStream) {\\n284:                 @Override\\n285:                 protected Record doReadRecord(long baseOffset, long baseTimestamp, int baseSequence, Long logAppendTime) throws IOException {\\n286:                     return DefaultRecord.readPartiallyFrom(inputStream, baseOffset, baseTimestamp, baseSequence, logAppendTime);\\n287:                 }\\n288:             };\\n289:         } else {\\n290:             return new StreamRecordIterator(inputStream) {\\n291:                 @Override\\n292:                 protected Record doReadRecord(long baseOffset, long baseTimestamp, int baseSequence, Long logAppendTime) throws IOException {\\n293:                     return DefaultRecord.readFrom(inputStream, baseOffset, baseTimestamp, baseSequence, logAppendTime);\\n294:                 }\\n295:             };\\n296:         }\\n297:     }\\n298: \\n299:     private CloseableIterator<Record> uncompressedIterator() {\\n300:         final ByteBuffer buffer = this.buffer.duplicate();\\n301:         buffer.position(RECORDS_OFFSET);\\n302:         return new RecordIterator() {\\n303:             @Override\\n304:             protected Record readNext(long baseOffset, long baseTimestamp, int baseSequence, Long logAppendTime) {\\n305:                 try {\\n306:                     return DefaultRecord.readFrom(buffer, baseOffset, baseTimestamp, baseSequence, logAppendTime);\\n307:                 } catch (BufferUnderflowException e) {\\n308:                     throw new InvalidRecordException(\\\"Incorrect declared batch size, premature EOF reached\\\");\\n309:                 }\\n310:             }\\n311:             @Override\\n312:             protected boolean ensureNoneRemaining() {\\n313:                 return !buffer.hasRemaining();\\n314:             }\\n315:             @Override\\n316:             public void close() {}\\n317:         };\\n318:     }\\n319: \\n320:     @Override\\n321:     public Iterator<Record> iterator() {\\n322:         if (count() == 0)\\n323:             return Collections.emptyIterator();\\n324: \\n325:         if (!isCompressed())\\n326:             return uncompressedIterator();\\n327: \\n328:         // for a normal iterator, we cannot ensure that the underlying compression stream is closed,\\n329:         // so we decompress the full record set here. Use cases which call for a lower memory footprint\\n330:         // can use `streamingIterator` at the cost of additional complexity\\n331:         try (CloseableIterator<Record> iterator = compressedIterator(BufferSupplier.NO_CACHING, false)) {\\n332:             List<Record> records = new ArrayList<>(count());\\n333:             while (iterator.hasNext())\\n334:                 records.add(iterator.next());\\n335:             return records.iterator();\\n336:         }\\n337:     }\\n338: \\n339:     @Override\\n340:     public CloseableIterator<Record> skipKeyValueIterator(BufferSupplier bufferSupplier) {\\n341:         if (count() == 0) {\\n342:             return CloseableIterator.wrap(Collections.emptyIterator());\\n343:         }\\n344: \\n345:         /*\\n346:          * For uncompressed iterator, it is actually not worth skipping key / value / headers at all since\\n347:          * its ByteBufferInputStream's skip() function is less efficient compared with just reading it actually\\n348:          * as it will allocate new byte array.\\n349:          */\\n350:         if (!isCompressed())\\n351:             return uncompressedIterator();\\n352: \\n353:         // we define this to be a closable iterator so that caller (i.e. the log validator) needs to close it\\n354:         // while we can save memory footprint of not decompressing the full record set ahead of time\\n355:         return compressedIterator(bufferSupplier, true);\\n356:     }\\n357: \\n358:     @Override\\n359:     public CloseableIterator<Record> streamingIterator(BufferSupplier bufferSupplier) {\\n360:         if (isCompressed())\\n361:             return compressedIterator(bufferSupplier, false);\\n362:         else\\n363:             return uncompressedIterator();\\n364:     }\\n365: \\n366:     @Override\\n367:     public void setLastOffset(long offset) {\\n368:         buffer.putLong(BASE_OFFSET_OFFSET, offset - lastOffsetDelta());\\n369:     }\\n370: \\n371:     @Override\\n372:     public void setMaxTimestamp(TimestampType timestampType, long maxTimestamp) {\\n373:         long currentMaxTimestamp = maxTimestamp();\\n374:         // We don't need to recompute crc if the timestamp is not updated.\\n375:         if (timestampType() == timestampType && currentMaxTimestamp == maxTimestamp)\\n376:             return;\\n377: \\n378:         byte attributes = computeAttributes(compressionType(), timestampType, isTransactional(), isControlBatch(), hasDeleteHorizonMs());\\n379:         buffer.putShort(ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET, attributes);\\n380:         buffer.putLong(MAX_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET, maxTimestamp);\\n381:         long crc = computeChecksum();\\n382:         ByteUtils.writeUnsignedInt(buffer, CRC_OFFSET, crc);\\n383:     }\\n384: \\n385:     @Override\\n386:     public void setPartitionLeaderEpoch(int epoch) {\\n387:         buffer.putInt(PARTITION_LEADER_EPOCH_OFFSET, epoch);\\n388:     }\\n389: \\n390:     @Override\\n391:     public long checksum() {\\n392:         return ByteUtils.readUnsignedInt(buffer, CRC_OFFSET);\\n393:     }\\n394: \\n395:     public boolean isValid() {\\n396:         return sizeInBytes() >= RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD && checksum() == computeChecksum();\\n397:     }\\n398: \\n399:     private long computeChecksum() {\\n400:         return Crc32C.compute(buffer, ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET, buffer.limit() - ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET);\\n401:     }\\n402: \\n403:     private byte attributes() {\\n404:         // note we're not using the second byte of attributes\\n405:         return (byte) buffer.getShort(ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET);\\n406:     }\\n407: \\n408:     @Override\\n409:     public boolean equals(Object o) {\\n410:         if (this == o)\\n411:             return true;\\n412:         if (o == null || getClass() != o.getClass())\\n413:             return false;\\n414: \\n415:         DefaultRecordBatch that = (DefaultRecordBatch) o;\\n416:         return Objects.equals(buffer, that.buffer);\\n417:     }\\n418: \\n419:     @Override\\n420:     public int hashCode() {\\n421:         return buffer != null ? buffer.hashCode() : 0;\\n422:     }\\n423: \\n424:     private static byte computeAttributes(CompressionType type, TimestampType timestampType,\\n425:                                           boolean isTransactional, boolean isControl, boolean isDeleteHorizonSet) {\\n426:         if (timestampType == TimestampType.NO_TIMESTAMP_TYPE)\\n427:             throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"Timestamp type must be provided to compute attributes for message \\\" +\\n428:                     \\\"format v2 and above\\\");\\n429: \\n430:         byte attributes = isTransactional ? TRANSACTIONAL_FLAG_MASK : 0;\\n431:         if (isControl)\\n432:             attributes |= CONTROL_FLAG_MASK;\\n433:         if (type.id > 0)\\n434:             attributes |= (byte) (COMPRESSION_CODEC_MASK & type.id);\\n435:         if (timestampType == TimestampType.LOG_APPEND_TIME)\\n436:             attributes |= TIMESTAMP_TYPE_MASK;\\n437:         if (isDeleteHorizonSet)\\n438:             attributes |= DELETE_HORIZON_FLAG_MASK;\\n439:         return attributes;\\n440:     }\\n441: \\n442:     public static void writeEmptyHeader(ByteBuffer buffer,\\n443:                                         byte magic,\\n444:                                         long producerId,\\n445:                                         short producerEpoch,\\n446:                                         int baseSequence,\\n447:                                         long baseOffset,\\n448:                                         long lastOffset,\\n449:                                         int partitionLeaderEpoch,\\n450:                                         TimestampType timestampType,\\n451:                                         long timestamp,\\n452:                                         boolean isTransactional,\\n453:                                         boolean isControlRecord) {\\n454:         int offsetDelta = (int) (lastOffset - baseOffset);\\n455:         writeHeader(buffer, baseOffset, offsetDelta, DefaultRecordBatch.RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD, magic,\\n456:                     CompressionType.NONE, timestampType, RecordBatch.NO_TIMESTAMP, timestamp, producerId,\\n457:                     producerEpoch, baseSequence, isTransactional, isControlRecord, false, partitionLeaderEpoch, 0);\\n458:     }\\n459: \\n460:     public static void writeHeader(ByteBuffer buffer,\\n461:                                    long baseOffset,\\n462:                                    int lastOffsetDelta,\\n463:                                    int sizeInBytes,\\n464:                                    byte magic,\\n465:                                    CompressionType compressionType,\\n466:                                    TimestampType timestampType,\\n467:                                    long baseTimestamp,\\n468:                                    long maxTimestamp,\\n469:                                    long producerId,\\n470:                                    short epoch,\\n471:                                    int sequence,\\n472:                                    boolean isTransactional,\\n473:                                    boolean isControlBatch,\\n474:                                    boolean isDeleteHorizonSet,\\n475:                                    int partitionLeaderEpoch,\\n476:                                    int numRecords) {\\n477:         if (magic < RecordBatch.CURRENT_MAGIC_VALUE)\\n478:             throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"Invalid magic value \\\" + magic);\\n479:         if (baseTimestamp < 0 && baseTimestamp != NO_TIMESTAMP)\\n480:             throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"Invalid message timestamp \\\" + baseTimestamp);\\n481: \\n482:         short attributes = computeAttributes(compressionType, timestampType, isTransactional, isControlBatch, isDeleteHorizonSet);\\n483: \\n484:         int position = buffer.position();\\n485:         buffer.putLong(position + BASE_OFFSET_OFFSET, baseOffset);\\n486:         buffer.putInt(position + LENGTH_OFFSET, sizeInBytes - LOG_OVERHEAD);\\n487:         buffer.putInt(position + PARTITION_LEADER_EPOCH_OFFSET, partitionLeaderEpoch);\\n488:         buffer.put(position + MAGIC_OFFSET, magic);\\n489:         buffer.putShort(position + ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET, attributes);\\n490:         buffer.putLong(position + BASE_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET, baseTimestamp);\\n491:         buffer.putLong(position + MAX_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET, maxTimestamp);\\n492:         buffer.putInt(position + LAST_OFFSET_DELTA_OFFSET, lastOffsetDelta);\\n493:         buffer.putLong(position + PRODUCER_ID_OFFSET, producerId);\\n494:         buffer.putShort(position + PRODUCER_EPOCH_OFFSET, epoch);\\n495:         buffer.putInt(position + BASE_SEQUENCE_OFFSET, sequence);\\n496:         buffer.putInt(position + RECORDS_COUNT_OFFSET, numRecords);\\n497:         long crc = Crc32C.compute(buffer, ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET, sizeInBytes - ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET);\\n498:         buffer.putInt(position + CRC_OFFSET, (int) crc);\\n499:         buffer.position(position + RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD);\\n500:     }\\n501: \\n502:     @Override\\n503:     public String toString() {\\n504:         return \\\"RecordBatch(magic=\\\" + magic() + \\\", offsets=[\\\" + baseOffset() + \\\", \\\" + lastOffset() + \\\"], \\\" +\\n505:                 \\\"sequence=[\\\" + baseSequence() + \\\", \\\" + lastSequence() + \\\"], \\\" +\\n506:                 \\\"partitionLeaderEpoch=\\\" + partitionLeaderEpoch() + \\\", \\\" +\\n507:                 \\\"isTransactional=\\\" + isTransactional() + \\\", isControlBatch=\\\" + isControlBatch() + \\\", \\\" +\\n508:                 \\\"compression=\\\" + compressionType() + \\\", timestampType=\\\" + timestampType() + \\\", crc=\\\" + checksum() + \\\")\\\";\\n509:     }\\n510: \\n511:     public static int sizeInBytes(long baseOffset, Iterable<Record> records) {\\n512:         Iterator<Record> iterator = records.iterator();\\n513:         if (!iterator.hasNext())\\n514:             return 0;\\n515: \\n516:         int size = RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD;\\n517:         Long baseTimestamp = null;\\n518:         while (iterator.hasNext()) {\\n519:             Record record = iterator.next();\\n520:             int offsetDelta = (int) (record.offset() - baseOffset);\\n521:             if (baseTimestamp == null)\\n522:                 baseTimestamp = record.timestamp();\\n523:             long timestampDelta = record.timestamp() - baseTimestamp;\\n524:             size += DefaultRecord.sizeInBytes(offsetDelta, timestampDelta, record.key(), record.value(),\\n525:                     record.headers());\\n526:         }\\n527:         return size;\\n528:     }\\n529: \\n530:     public static int sizeInBytes(Iterable<SimpleRecord> records) {\\n531:         Iterator<SimpleRecord> iterator = records.iterator();\\n532:         if (!iterator.hasNext())\\n533:             return 0;\\n534: \\n535:         int size = RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD;\\n536:         int offsetDelta = 0;\\n537:         Long baseTimestamp = null;\\n538:         while (iterator.hasNext()) {\\n539:             SimpleRecord record = iterator.next();\\n540:             if (baseTimestamp == null)\\n541:                 baseTimestamp = record.timestamp();\\n542:             long timestampDelta = record.timestamp() - baseTimestamp;\\n543:             size += DefaultRecord.sizeInBytes(offsetDelta++, timestampDelta, record.key(), record.value(),\\n544:                     record.headers());\\n545:         }\\n546:         return size;\\n547:     }\\n548: \\n549:     /**\\n550:      * Get an upper bound on the size of a batch with only a single record using a given key and value. This\\n551:      * is only an estimate because it does not take into account additional overhead from the compression\\n552:      * algorithm used.\\n553:      */\\n554:     static int estimateBatchSizeUpperBound(ByteBuffer key, ByteBuffer value, Header[] headers) {\\n555:         return RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD + DefaultRecord.recordSizeUpperBound(key, value, headers);\\n556:     }\\n557: \\n558:     public static int incrementSequence(int sequence, int increment) {\\n559:         if (sequence > Integer.MAX_VALUE - increment)\\n560:             return increment - (Integer.MAX_VALUE - sequence) - 1;\\n561:         return sequence + increment;\\n562:     }\\n563: \\n564:     public static int decrementSequence(int sequence, int decrement) {\\n565:         if (sequence < decrement)\\n566:             return Integer.MAX_VALUE - (decrement - sequence) + 1;\\n567:         return sequence - decrement;\\n568:     }\\n569: \\n570:     // visible for testing\\n571:     abstract class RecordIterator implements CloseableIterator<Record> {\\n572:         private final Long logAppendTime;\\n573:         private final long baseOffset;\\n574:         private final long baseTimestamp;\\n575:         private final int baseSequence;\\n576:         private final int numRecords;\\n577:         private int readRecords = 0;\\n578: \\n579:         RecordIterator() {\\n580:             this.logAppendTime = timestampType() == TimestampType.LOG_APPEND_TIME ? maxTimestamp() : null;\\n581:             this.baseOffset = baseOffset();\\n582:             this.baseTimestamp = baseTimestamp();\\n583:             this.baseSequence = baseSequence();\\n584:             int numRecords = count();\\n585:             if (numRecords < 0)\\n586:                 throw new InvalidRecordException(\\\"Found invalid record count \\\" + numRecords + \\\" in magic v\\\" +\\n587:                         magic() + \\\" batch\\\");\\n588:             this.numRecords = numRecords;\\n589:         }\\n590: \\n591:         @Override\\n592:         public boolean hasNext() {\\n593:             return readRecords < numRecords;\\n594:         }\\n595: \\n596:         @Override\\n597:         public Record next() {\\n598:             if (readRecords >= numRecords)\\n599:                 throw new NoSuchElementException();\\n600: \\n601:             readRecords++;\\n602:             Record rec = readNext(baseOffset, baseTimestamp, baseSequence, logAppendTime);\\n603:             if (readRecords == numRecords) {\\n604:                 // Validate that the actual size of the batch is equal to declared size\\n605:                 // by checking that after reading declared number of items, there no items left\\n606:                 // (overflow case, i.e. reading past buffer end is checked elsewhere).\\n607:                 if (!ensureNoneRemaining())\\n608:                     throw new InvalidRecordException(\\\"Incorrect declared batch size, records still remaining in file\\\");\\n609:             }\\n610:             return rec;\\n611:         }\\n612: \\n613:         protected abstract Record readNext(long baseOffset, long baseTimestamp, int baseSequence, Long logAppendTime);\\n614: \\n615:         protected abstract boolean ensureNoneRemaining();\\n616: \\n617:         @Override\\n618:         public void remove() {\\n619:             throw new UnsupportedOperationException();\\n620:         }\\n621: \\n622:     }\\n623: \\n624:     // visible for testing\\n625:     abstract class StreamRecordIterator extends RecordIterator {\\n626:         private final InputStream inputStream;\\n627: \\n628:         StreamRecordIterator(InputStream inputStream) {\\n629:             super();\\n630:             this.inputStream = inputStream;\\n631:         }\\n632: \\n633:         abstract Record doReadRecord(long baseOffset, long baseTimestamp, int baseSequence, Long logAppendTime) throws IOException;\\n634: \\n635:         @Override\\n636:         protected Record readNext(long baseOffset, long baseTimestamp, int baseSequence, Long logAppendTime) {\\n637:             try {\\n638:                 return doReadRecord(baseOffset, baseTimestamp, baseSequence, logAppendTime);\\n639:             } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {\\n640:                 throw new InvalidRecordException(\\\"Incorrect declared batch size, premature EOF reached\\\", e);\\n641:             } catch (IOException e) {\\n642:                 throw new KafkaException(\\\"Failed to decompress record stream\\\", e);\\n643:             }\\n644:         }\\n645: \\n646:         @Override\\n647:         protected boolean ensureNoneRemaining() {\\n648:             try {\\n649:                 return inputStream.read() == -1;\\n650:             } catch (IOException e) {\\n651:                 throw new KafkaException(\\\"Error checking for remaining bytes after reading batch\\\", e);\\n652:             }\\n653:         }\\n654: \\n655:         @Override\\n656:         public void close() {\\n657:             try {\\n658:                 inputStream.close();\\n659:             } catch (IOException e) {\\n660:                 throw new KafkaException(\\\"Failed to close record stream\\\", e);\\n661:             }\\n662:         }\\n663:     }\\n664: \\n665:     static class DefaultFileChannelRecordBatch extends FileLogInputStream.FileChannelRecordBatch {\\n666: \\n667:         DefaultFileChannelRecordBatch(long offset,\\n668:                                       byte magic,\\n669:                                       FileRecords fileRecords,\\n670:                                       int position,\\n671:                                       int batchSize) {\\n672:             super(offset, magic, fileRecords, position, batchSize);\\n673:         }\\n674: \\n675:         @Override\\n676:         protected RecordBatch toMemoryRecordBatch(ByteBuffer buffer) {\\n677:             return new DefaultRecordBatch(buffer);\\n678:         }\\n679: \\n680:         @Override\\n681:         public long baseOffset() {\\n682:             return offset;\\n683:         }\\n684: \\n685:         @Override\\n686:         public long lastOffset() {\\n687:             return loadBatchHeader().lastOffset();\\n688:         }\\n689: \\n690:         @Override\\n691:         public long producerId() {\\n692:             return loadBatchHeader().producerId();\\n693:         }\\n694: \\n695:         @Override\\n696:         public short producerEpoch() {\\n697:             return loadBatchHeader().producerEpoch();\\n698:         }\\n699: \\n700:         @Override\\n701:         public int baseSequence() {\\n702:             return loadBatchHeader().baseSequence();\\n703:         }\\n704: \\n705:         @Override\\n706:         public int lastSequence() {\\n707:             return loadBatchHeader().lastSequence();\\n708:         }\\n709: \\n710:         @Override\\n711:         public Integer countOrNull() {\\n712:             return loadBatchHeader().countOrNull();\\n713:         }\\n714: \\n715:         @Override\\n716:         public boolean isTransactional() {\\n717:             return loadBatchHeader().isTransactional();\\n718:         }\\n719: \\n720:         @Override\\n721:         public OptionalLong deleteHorizonMs() {\\n722:             return loadBatchHeader().deleteHorizonMs();\\n723:         }\\n724: \\n725:         @Override\\n726:         public boolean isControlBatch() {\\n727:             return loadBatchHeader().isControlBatch();\\n728:         }\\n729: \\n730:         @Override\\n731:         public int partitionLeaderEpoch() {\\n732:             return loadBatchHeader().partitionLeaderEpoch();\\n733:         }\\n734: \\n735:         @Override\\n736:         protected int headerSize() {\\n737:             return RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD;\\n738:         }\\n739:     }\\n740: \\n741: }\\n742: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-benchmarks/kafka--e678b4b@47ac12bd6042edf23f1dbca3d789db945d62802d/-/blob/clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/record/internal/DefaultRecordBatch.java\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more\n3:  * contributor license agreements. See the NOTICE file distributed with\n4:  * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.\n5:  * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0\n6:  * (the \"License\"); you may not use this file except in compliance with\n7:  * the License. You may obtain a copy of the License at\n8:  *\n9:  *    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n10:  *\n11:  * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n12:  * distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n13:  * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n14:  * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n15:  * limitations under the License.\n16:  */\n17: package org.apache.kafka.common.record.internal;\n18: \n19: import org.apache.kafka.common.InvalidRecordException;\n20: import org.apache.kafka.common.KafkaException;\n21: import org.apache.kafka.common.compress.Compression;\n22: import org.apache.kafka.common.errors.CorruptRecordException;\n23: import org.apache.kafka.common.header.Header;\n24: import org.apache.kafka.common.record.TimestampType;\n25: import org.apache.kafka.common.utils.BufferSupplier;\n26: import org.apache.kafka.common.utils.ByteBufferOutputStream;\n27: import org.apache.kafka.common.utils.ByteUtils;\n28: import org.apache.kafka.common.utils.CloseableIterator;\n29: import org.apache.kafka.common.utils.Crc32C;\n30: \n31: import java.io.IOException;\n32: import java.io.InputStream;\n33: import java.nio.BufferUnderflowException;\n34: import java.nio.ByteBuffer;\n35: import java.util.ArrayList;\n36: import java.util.Collections;\n37: import java.util.Iterator;\n38: import java.util.List;\n39: import java.util.NoSuchElementException;\n40: import java.util.Objects;\n41: import java.util.OptionalLong;\n42: \n43: import static org.apache.kafka.common.record.internal.Records.LOG_OVERHEAD;\n44: \n45: /**\n46:  * RecordBatch implementation for magic 2 and above. The schema is given below:\n47:  *\n48:  * RecordBatch =>\n49:  *  BaseOffset => Int64\n50:  *  Length => Int32\n51:  *  PartitionLeaderEpoch => Int32\n52:  *  Magic => Int8\n53:  *  CRC => Uint32\n54:  *  Attributes => Int16\n55:  *  LastOffsetDelta => Int32 // also serves as LastSequenceDelta\n56:  *  BaseTimestamp => Int64\n57:  *  MaxTimestamp => Int64\n58:  *  ProducerId => Int64\n59:  *  ProducerEpoch => Int16\n60:  *  BaseSequence => Int32\n61:  *  RecordsCount => Int32\n62:  *  Records => [Record]\n63:  *\n64:  * Note that when compression is enabled (see attributes below), the compressed record data is serialized\n65:  * directly following the count of the number of records.\n66:  *\n67:  * The CRC covers the data from the attributes to the end of the batch (i.e. all the bytes that follow the CRC). It is\n68:  * located after the magic byte, which means that clients must parse the magic byte before deciding how to interpret\n69:  * the bytes between the batch length and the magic byte. The partition leader epoch field is not included in the CRC\n70:  * computation to avoid the need to recompute the CRC when this field is assigned for every batch that is received by\n71:  * the broker. The CRC-32C (Castagnoli) polynomial is used for the computation.\n72:  *\n73:  * On Compaction: Unlike the older message formats, magic v2 and above preserves the first and last offset/sequence\n74:  * numbers from the original batch when the log is cleaned. This is required in order to be able to restore the\n75:  * producer's state when the log is reloaded. If we did not retain the last sequence number, then following\n76:  * a partition leader failure, once the new leader has rebuilt the producer state from the log, the next sequence\n77:  * expected number would no longer be in sync with what was written by the client. This would cause an\n78:  * unexpected OutOfOrderSequence error, which is typically fatal. The base sequence number must be preserved for\n79:  * duplicate checking: the broker checks incoming Produce requests for duplicates by verifying that the first and\n80:  * last sequence numbers of the incoming batch match the last from that producer.\n81:  *\n82:  * Note that if all of the records in a batch are removed during compaction, the broker may still retain an empty\n83:  * batch header in order to preserve the producer sequence information as described above. These empty batches\n84:  * are retained only until either a new sequence number is written by the corresponding producer or the producerId\n85:  * is expired from lack of activity.\n86:  *\n87:  * There is no similar need to preserve the timestamp from the original batch after compaction. The BaseTimestamp\n88:  * field therefore reflects the timestamp of the first record in the batch in most cases. If the batch is empty, the\n89:  * BaseTimestamp will be set to -1 (NO_TIMESTAMP). If the delete horizon flag is set to 1, the BaseTimestamp\n90:  * will be set to the time at which tombstone records and aborted transaction markers in the batch should be removed.\n91:  *\n92:  * Similarly, the MaxTimestamp field reflects the maximum timestamp of the current records if the timestamp type\n93:  * is CREATE_TIME. For LOG_APPEND_TIME, on the other hand, the MaxTimestamp field reflects the timestamp set\n94:  * by the broker and is preserved after compaction. Additionally, the MaxTimestamp of an empty batch always retains\n95:  * the previous value prior to becoming empty.\n96:  *\n97:  * The current attributes are given below:\n98:  *\n99:  *  ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n100:  *  | Unused (7-15) | Delete Horizon Flag (6) | Control (5) | Transactional (4) | Timestamp Type (3) | Compression Type (0-2) |\n101:  *  ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n102:  */\n103: public class DefaultRecordBatch extends AbstractRecordBatch implements MutableRecordBatch {\n104:     static final int BASE_OFFSET_OFFSET = 0;\n105:     static final int BASE_OFFSET_LENGTH = 8;\n106:     static final int LENGTH_OFFSET = BASE_OFFSET_OFFSET + BASE_OFFSET_LENGTH;\n107:     static final int LENGTH_LENGTH = 4;\n108:     static final int PARTITION_LEADER_EPOCH_OFFSET = LENGTH_OFFSET + LENGTH_LENGTH;\n109:     static final int PARTITION_LEADER_EPOCH_LENGTH = 4;\n110:     static final int MAGIC_OFFSET = PARTITION_LEADER_EPOCH_OFFSET + PARTITION_LEADER_EPOCH_LENGTH;\n111:     static final int MAGIC_LENGTH = 1;\n112:     public static final int CRC_OFFSET = MAGIC_OFFSET + MAGIC_LENGTH;\n113:     static final int CRC_LENGTH = 4;\n114:     static final int ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET = CRC_OFFSET + CRC_LENGTH;\n115:     static final int ATTRIBUTE_LENGTH = 2;\n116:     public static final int LAST_OFFSET_DELTA_OFFSET = ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET + ATTRIBUTE_LENGTH;\n117:     static final int LAST_OFFSET_DELTA_LENGTH = 4;\n118:     static final int BASE_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET = LAST_OFFSET_DELTA_OFFSET + LAST_OFFSET_DELTA_LENGTH;\n119:     static final int BASE_TIMESTAMP_LENGTH = 8;\n120:     static final int MAX_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET = BASE_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET + BASE_TIMESTAMP_LENGTH;\n121:     static final int MAX_TIMESTAMP_LENGTH = 8;\n122:     static final int PRODUCER_ID_OFFSET = MAX_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET + MAX_TIMESTAMP_LENGTH;\n123:     static final int PRODUCER_ID_LENGTH = 8;\n124:     static final int PRODUCER_EPOCH_OFFSET = PRODUCER_ID_OFFSET + PRODUCER_ID_LENGTH;\n125:     static final int PRODUCER_EPOCH_LENGTH = 2;\n126:     static final int BASE_SEQUENCE_OFFSET = PRODUCER_EPOCH_OFFSET + PRODUCER_EPOCH_LENGTH;\n127:     static final int BASE_SEQUENCE_LENGTH = 4;\n128:     public static final int RECORDS_COUNT_OFFSET = BASE_SEQUENCE_OFFSET + BASE_SEQUENCE_LENGTH;\n129:     static final int RECORDS_COUNT_LENGTH = 4;\n130:     static final int RECORDS_OFFSET = RECORDS_COUNT_OFFSET + RECORDS_COUNT_LENGTH;\n131:     public static final int RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD = RECORDS_OFFSET;\n132: \n133:     private static final byte COMPRESSION_CODEC_MASK = 0x07;\n134:     private static final byte TRANSACTIONAL_FLAG_MASK = 0x10;\n135:     private static final int CONTROL_FLAG_MASK = 0x20;\n136:     private static final byte DELETE_HORIZON_FLAG_MASK = 0x40;\n137:     private static final byte TIMESTAMP_TYPE_MASK = 0x08;\n138: \n139:     private final ByteBuffer buffer;\n140: \n141:     DefaultRecordBatch(ByteBuffer buffer) {\n142:         this.buffer = buffer;\n143:     }\n144: \n145:     @Override\n146:     public byte magic() {\n147:         return buffer.get(MAGIC_OFFSET);\n148:     }\n149: \n150:     @Override\n151:     public void ensureValid() {\n152:         if (sizeInBytes() < RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD)\n153:             throw new CorruptRecordException(\"Record batch is corrupt (the size \" + sizeInBytes() +\n154:                     \" is smaller than the minimum allowed overhead \" + RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD + \")\");\n155: \n156:         if (!isValid())\n157:             throw new CorruptRecordException(\"Record is corrupt (stored crc = \" + checksum()\n158:                     + \", computed crc = \" + computeChecksum() + \")\");\n159:     }\n160: \n161:     /**\n162:      * Gets the base timestamp of the batch which is used to calculate the record timestamps from the deltas.\n163:      *\n164:      * @return The base timestamp\n165:      */\n166:     public long baseTimestamp() {\n167:         return buffer.getLong(BASE_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET);\n168:     }\n169: \n170:     @Override\n171:     public long maxTimestamp() {\n172:         return buffer.getLong(MAX_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET);\n173:     }\n174: \n175:     @Override\n176:     public TimestampType timestampType() {\n177:         return (attributes() & TIMESTAMP_TYPE_MASK) == 0 ? TimestampType.CREATE_TIME : TimestampType.LOG_APPEND_TIME;\n178:     }\n179: \n180:     @Override\n181:     public long baseOffset() {\n182:         return buffer.getLong(BASE_OFFSET_OFFSET);\n183:     }\n184: \n185:     @Override\n186:     public long lastOffset() {\n187:         return baseOffset() + lastOffsetDelta();\n188:     }\n189: \n190:     @Override\n191:     public long producerId() {\n192:         return buffer.getLong(PRODUCER_ID_OFFSET);\n193:     }\n194: \n195:     @Override\n196:     public short producerEpoch() {\n197:         return buffer.getShort(PRODUCER_EPOCH_OFFSET);\n198:     }\n199: \n200:     @Override\n201:     public int baseSequence() {\n202:         return buffer.getInt(BASE_SEQUENCE_OFFSET);\n203:     }\n204: \n205:     private int lastOffsetDelta() {\n206:         return buffer.getInt(LAST_OFFSET_DELTA_OFFSET);\n207:     }\n208: \n209:     @Override\n210:     public int lastSequence() {\n211:         int baseSequence = baseSequence();\n212:         if (baseSequence == RecordBatch.NO_SEQUENCE)\n213:             return RecordBatch.NO_SEQUENCE;\n214:         return incrementSequence(baseSequence, lastOffsetDelta());\n215:     }\n216: \n217:     @Override\n218:     public CompressionType compressionType() {\n219:         return CompressionType.forId(attributes() & COMPRESSION_CODEC_MASK);\n220:     }\n221: \n222:     @Override\n223:     public int sizeInBytes() {\n224:         return LOG_OVERHEAD + buffer.getInt(LENGTH_OFFSET);\n225:     }\n226: \n227:     private int count() {\n228:         return buffer.getInt(RECORDS_COUNT_OFFSET);\n229:     }\n230: \n231:     @Override\n232:     public Integer countOrNull() {\n233:         return count();\n234:     }\n235: \n236:     @Override\n237:     public void writeTo(ByteBuffer buffer) {\n238:         buffer.put(this.buffer.duplicate());\n239:     }\n240: \n241:     @Override\n242:     public void writeTo(ByteBufferOutputStream outputStream) {\n243:         outputStream.write(this.buffer.duplicate());\n244:     }\n245: \n246:     @Override\n247:     public boolean isTransactional() {\n248:         return (attributes() & TRANSACTIONAL_FLAG_MASK) > 0;\n249:     }\n250: \n251:     private boolean hasDeleteHorizonMs() {\n252:         return (attributes() & DELETE_HORIZON_FLAG_MASK) > 0;\n253:     }\n254: \n255:     @Override\n256:     public OptionalLong deleteHorizonMs() {\n257:         if (hasDeleteHorizonMs())\n258:             return OptionalLong.of(buffer.getLong(BASE_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET));\n259:         else\n260:             return OptionalLong.empty();\n261:     }\n262: \n263:     @Override\n264:     public boolean isControlBatch() {\n265:         return (attributes() & CONTROL_FLAG_MASK) > 0;\n266:     }\n267: \n268:     @Override\n269:     public int partitionLeaderEpoch() {\n270:         return buffer.getInt(PARTITION_LEADER_EPOCH_OFFSET);\n271:     }\n272: \n273:     public InputStream recordInputStream(BufferSupplier bufferSupplier) {\n274:         final ByteBuffer buffer = this.buffer.duplicate();\n275:         buffer.position(RECORDS_OFFSET);\n276:         return Compression.of(compressionType()).build().wrapForInput(buffer, magic(), bufferSupplier);\n277:     }\n278: \n279:     private CloseableIterator<Record> compressedIterator(BufferSupplier bufferSupplier, boolean skipKeyValue) {\n280:         final InputStream inputStream = recordInputStream(bufferSupplier);\n281: \n282:         if (skipKeyValue) {\n283:             return new StreamRecordIterator(inputStream) {\n284:                 @Override\n285:                 protected Record doReadRecord(long baseOffset, long baseTimestamp, int baseSequence, Long logAppendTime) throws IOException {\n286:                     return DefaultRecord.readPartiallyFrom(inputStream, baseOffset, baseTimestamp, baseSequence, logAppendTime);\n287:                 }\n288:             };\n289:         } else {\n290:             return new StreamRecordIterator(inputStream) {\n291:                 @Override\n292:                 protected Record doReadRecord(long baseOffset, long baseTimestamp, int baseSequence, Long logAppendTime) throws IOException {\n293:                     return DefaultRecord.readFrom(inputStream, baseOffset, baseTimestamp, baseSequence, logAppendTime);\n294:                 }\n295:             };\n296:         }\n297:     }\n298: \n299:     private CloseableIterator<Record> uncompressedIterator() {\n300:         final ByteBuffer buffer = this.buffer.duplicate();\n301:         buffer.position(RECORDS_OFFSET);\n302:         return new RecordIterator() {\n303:             @Override\n304:             protected Record readNext(long baseOffset, long baseTimestamp, int baseSequence, Long logAppendTime) {\n305:                 try {\n306:                     return DefaultRecord.readFrom(buffer, baseOffset, baseTimestamp, baseSequence, logAppendTime);\n307:                 } catch (BufferUnderflowException e) {\n308:                     throw new InvalidRecordException(\"Incorrect declared batch size, premature EOF reached\");\n309:                 }\n310:             }\n311:             @Override\n312:             protected boolean ensureNoneRemaining() {\n313:                 return !buffer.hasRemaining();\n314:             }\n315:             @Override\n316:             public void close() {}\n317:         };\n318:     }\n319: \n320:     @Override\n321:     public Iterator<Record> iterator() {\n322:         if (count() == 0)\n323:             return Collections.emptyIterator();\n324: \n325:         if (!isCompressed())\n326:             return uncompressedIterator();\n327: \n328:         // for a normal iterator, we cannot ensure that the underlying compression stream is closed,\n329:         // so we decompress the full record set here. Use cases which call for a lower memory footprint\n330:         // can use `streamingIterator` at the cost of additional complexity\n331:         try (CloseableIterator<Record> iterator = compressedIterator(BufferSupplier.NO_CACHING, false)) {\n332:             List<Record> records = new ArrayList<>(count());\n333:             while (iterator.hasNext())\n334:                 records.add(iterator.next());\n335:             return records.iterator();\n336:         }\n337:     }\n338: \n339:     @Override\n340:     public CloseableIterator<Record> skipKeyValueIterator(BufferSupplier bufferSupplier) {\n341:         if (count() == 0) {\n342:             return CloseableIterator.wrap(Collections.emptyIterator());\n343:         }\n344: \n345:         /*\n346:          * For uncompressed iterator, it is actually not worth skipping key / value / headers at all since\n347:          * its ByteBufferInputStream's skip() function is less efficient compared with just reading it actually\n348:          * as it will allocate new byte array.\n349:          */\n350:         if (!isCompressed())\n351:             return uncompressedIterator();\n352: \n353:         // we define this to be a closable iterator so that caller (i.e. the log validator) needs to close it\n354:         // while we can save memory footprint of not decompressing the full record set ahead of time\n355:         return compressedIterator(bufferSupplier, true);\n356:     }\n357: \n358:     @Override\n359:     public CloseableIterator<Record> streamingIterator(BufferSupplier bufferSupplier) {\n360:         if (isCompressed())\n361:             return compressedIterator(bufferSupplier, false);\n362:         else\n363:             return uncompressedIterator();\n364:     }\n365: \n366:     @Override\n367:     public void setLastOffset(long offset) {\n368:         buffer.putLong(BASE_OFFSET_OFFSET, offset - lastOffsetDelta());\n369:     }\n370: \n371:     @Override\n372:     public void setMaxTimestamp(TimestampType timestampType, long maxTimestamp) {\n373:         long currentMaxTimestamp = maxTimestamp();\n374:         // We don't need to recompute crc if the timestamp is not updated.\n375:         if (timestampType() == timestampType && currentMaxTimestamp == maxTimestamp)\n376:             return;\n377: \n378:         byte attributes = computeAttributes(compressionType(), timestampType, isTransactional(), isControlBatch(), hasDeleteHorizonMs());\n379:         buffer.putShort(ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET, attributes);\n380:         buffer.putLong(MAX_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET, maxTimestamp);\n381:         long crc = computeChecksum();\n382:         ByteUtils.writeUnsignedInt(buffer, CRC_OFFSET, crc);\n383:     }\n384: \n385:     @Override\n386:     public void setPartitionLeaderEpoch(int epoch) {\n387:         buffer.putInt(PARTITION_LEADER_EPOCH_OFFSET, epoch);\n388:     }\n389: \n390:     @Override\n391:     public long checksum() {\n392:         return ByteUtils.readUnsignedInt(buffer, CRC_OFFSET);\n393:     }\n394: \n395:     public boolean isValid() {\n396:         return sizeInBytes() >= RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD && checksum() == computeChecksum();\n397:     }\n398: \n399:     private long computeChecksum() {\n400:         return Crc32C.compute(buffer, ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET, buffer.limit() - ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET);\n401:     }\n402: \n403:     private byte attributes() {\n404:         // note we're not using the second byte of attributes\n405:         return (byte) buffer.getShort(ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET);\n406:     }\n407: \n408:     @Override\n409:     public boolean equals(Object o) {\n410:         if (this == o)\n411:             return true;\n412:         if (o == null || getClass() != o.getClass())\n413:             return false;\n414: \n415:         DefaultRecordBatch that = (DefaultRecordBatch) o;\n416:         return Objects.equals(buffer, that.buffer);\n417:     }\n418: \n419:     @Override\n420:     public int hashCode() {\n421:         return buffer != null ? buffer.hashCode() : 0;\n422:     }\n423: \n424:     private static byte computeAttributes(CompressionType type, TimestampType timestampType,\n425:                                           boolean isTransactional, boolean isControl, boolean isDeleteHorizonSet) {\n426:         if (timestampType == TimestampType.NO_TIMESTAMP_TYPE)\n427:             throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"Timestamp type must be provided to compute attributes for message \" +\n428:                     \"format v2 and above\");\n429: \n430:         byte attributes = isTransactional ? TRANSACTIONAL_FLAG_MASK : 0;\n431:         if (isControl)\n432:             attributes |= CONTROL_FLAG_MASK;\n433:         if (type.id > 0)\n434:             attributes |= (byte) (COMPRESSION_CODEC_MASK & type.id);\n435:         if (timestampType == TimestampType.LOG_APPEND_TIME)\n436:             attributes |= TIMESTAMP_TYPE_MASK;\n437:         if (isDeleteHorizonSet)\n438:             attributes |= DELETE_HORIZON_FLAG_MASK;\n439:         return attributes;\n440:     }\n441: \n442:     public static void writeEmptyHeader(ByteBuffer buffer,\n443:                                         byte magic,\n444:                                         long producerId,\n445:                                         short producerEpoch,\n446:                                         int baseSequence,\n447:                                         long baseOffset,\n448:                                         long lastOffset,\n449:                                         int partitionLeaderEpoch,\n450:                                         TimestampType timestampType,\n451:                                         long timestamp,\n452:                                         boolean isTransactional,\n453:                                         boolean isControlRecord) {\n454:         int offsetDelta = (int) (lastOffset - baseOffset);\n455:         writeHeader(buffer, baseOffset, offsetDelta, DefaultRecordBatch.RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD, magic,\n456:                     CompressionType.NONE, timestampType, RecordBatch.NO_TIMESTAMP, timestamp, producerId,\n457:                     producerEpoch, baseSequence, isTransactional, isControlRecord, false, partitionLeaderEpoch, 0);\n458:     }\n459: \n460:     public static void writeHeader(ByteBuffer buffer,\n461:                                    long baseOffset,\n462:                                    int lastOffsetDelta,\n463:                                    int sizeInBytes,\n464:                                    byte magic,\n465:                                    CompressionType compressionType,\n466:                                    TimestampType timestampType,\n467:                                    long baseTimestamp,\n468:                                    long maxTimestamp,\n469:                                    long producerId,\n470:                                    short epoch,\n471:                                    int sequence,\n472:                                    boolean isTransactional,\n473:                                    boolean isControlBatch,\n474:                                    boolean isDeleteHorizonSet,\n475:                                    int partitionLeaderEpoch,\n476:                                    int numRecords) {\n477:         if (magic < RecordBatch.CURRENT_MAGIC_VALUE)\n478:             throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"Invalid magic value \" + magic);\n479:         if (baseTimestamp < 0 && baseTimestamp != NO_TIMESTAMP)\n480:             throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"Invalid message timestamp \" + baseTimestamp);\n481: \n482:         short attributes = computeAttributes(compressionType, timestampType, isTransactional, isControlBatch, isDeleteHorizonSet);\n483: \n484:         int position = buffer.position();\n485:         buffer.putLong(position + BASE_OFFSET_OFFSET, baseOffset);\n486:         buffer.putInt(position + LENGTH_OFFSET, sizeInBytes - LOG_OVERHEAD);\n487:         buffer.putInt(position + PARTITION_LEADER_EPOCH_OFFSET, partitionLeaderEpoch);\n488:         buffer.put(position + MAGIC_OFFSET, magic);\n489:         buffer.putShort(position + ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET, attributes);\n490:         buffer.putLong(position + BASE_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET, baseTimestamp);\n491:         buffer.putLong(position + MAX_TIMESTAMP_OFFSET, maxTimestamp);\n492:         buffer.putInt(position + LAST_OFFSET_DELTA_OFFSET, lastOffsetDelta);\n493:         buffer.putLong(position + PRODUCER_ID_OFFSET, producerId);\n494:         buffer.putShort(position + PRODUCER_EPOCH_OFFSET, epoch);\n495:         buffer.putInt(position + BASE_SEQUENCE_OFFSET, sequence);\n496:         buffer.putInt(position + RECORDS_COUNT_OFFSET, numRecords);\n497:         long crc = Crc32C.compute(buffer, ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET, sizeInBytes - ATTRIBUTES_OFFSET);\n498:         buffer.putInt(position + CRC_OFFSET, (int) crc);\n499:         buffer.position(position + RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD);\n500:     }\n501: \n502:     @Override\n503:     public String toString() {\n504:         return \"RecordBatch(magic=\" + magic() + \", offsets=[\" + baseOffset() + \", \" + lastOffset() + \"], \" +\n505:                 \"sequence=[\" + baseSequence() + \", \" + lastSequence() + \"], \" +\n506:                 \"partitionLeaderEpoch=\" + partitionLeaderEpoch() + \", \" +\n507:                 \"isTransactional=\" + isTransactional() + \", isControlBatch=\" + isControlBatch() + \", \" +\n508:                 \"compression=\" + compressionType() + \", timestampType=\" + timestampType() + \", crc=\" + checksum() + \")\";\n509:     }\n510: \n511:     public static int sizeInBytes(long baseOffset, Iterable<Record> records) {\n512:         Iterator<Record> iterator = records.iterator();\n513:         if (!iterator.hasNext())\n514:             return 0;\n515: \n516:         int size = RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD;\n517:         Long baseTimestamp = null;\n518:         while (iterator.hasNext()) {\n519:             Record record = iterator.next();\n520:             int offsetDelta = (int) (record.offset() - baseOffset);\n521:             if (baseTimestamp == null)\n522:                 baseTimestamp = record.timestamp();\n523:             long timestampDelta = record.timestamp() - baseTimestamp;\n524:             size += DefaultRecord.sizeInBytes(offsetDelta, timestampDelta, record.key(), record.value(),\n525:                     record.headers());\n526:         }\n527:         return size;\n528:     }\n529: \n530:     public static int sizeInBytes(Iterable<SimpleRecord> records) {\n531:         Iterator<SimpleRecord> iterator = records.iterator();\n532:         if (!iterator.hasNext())\n533:             return 0;\n534: \n535:         int size = RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD;\n536:         int offsetDelta = 0;\n537:         Long baseTimestamp = null;\n538:         while (iterator.hasNext()) {\n539:             SimpleRecord record = iterator.next();\n540:             if (baseTimestamp == null)\n541:                 baseTimestamp = record.timestamp();\n542:             long timestampDelta = record.timestamp() - baseTimestamp;\n543:             size += DefaultRecord.sizeInBytes(offsetDelta++, timestampDelta, record.key(), record.value(),\n544:                     record.headers());\n545:         }\n546:         return size;\n547:     }\n548: \n549:     /**\n550:      * Get an upper bound on the size of a batch with only a single record using a given key and value. This\n551:      * is only an estimate because it does not take into account additional overhead from the compression\n552:      * algorithm used.\n553:      */\n554:     static int estimateBatchSizeUpperBound(ByteBuffer key, ByteBuffer value, Header[] headers) {\n555:         return RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD + DefaultRecord.recordSizeUpperBound(key, value, headers);\n556:     }\n557: \n558:     public static int incrementSequence(int sequence, int increment) {\n559:         if (sequence > Integer.MAX_VALUE - increment)\n560:             return increment - (Integer.MAX_VALUE - sequence) - 1;\n561:         return sequence + increment;\n562:     }\n563: \n564:     public static int decrementSequence(int sequence, int decrement) {\n565:         if (sequence < decrement)\n566:             return Integer.MAX_VALUE - (decrement - sequence) + 1;\n567:         return sequence - decrement;\n568:     }\n569: \n570:     // visible for testing\n571:     abstract class RecordIterator implements CloseableIterator<Record> {\n572:         private final Long logAppendTime;\n573:         private final long baseOffset;\n574:         private final long baseTimestamp;\n575:         private final int baseSequence;\n576:         private final int numRecords;\n577:         private int readRecords = 0;\n578: \n579:         RecordIterator() {\n580:             this.logAppendTime = timestampType() == TimestampType.LOG_APPEND_TIME ? maxTimestamp() : null;\n581:             this.baseOffset = baseOffset();\n582:             this.baseTimestamp = baseTimestamp();\n583:             this.baseSequence = baseSequence();\n584:             int numRecords = count();\n585:             if (numRecords < 0)\n586:                 throw new InvalidRecordException(\"Found invalid record count \" + numRecords + \" in magic v\" +\n587:                         magic() + \" batch\");\n588:             this.numRecords = numRecords;\n589:         }\n590: \n591:         @Override\n592:         public boolean hasNext() {\n593:             return readRecords < numRecords;\n594:         }\n595: \n596:         @Override\n597:         public Record next() {\n598:             if (readRecords >= numRecords)\n599:                 throw new NoSuchElementException();\n600: \n601:             readRecords++;\n602:             Record rec = readNext(baseOffset, baseTimestamp, baseSequence, logAppendTime);\n603:             if (readRecords == numRecords) {\n604:                 // Validate that the actual size of the batch is equal to declared size\n605:                 // by checking that after reading declared number of items, there no items left\n606:                 // (overflow case, i.e. reading past buffer end is checked elsewhere).\n607:                 if (!ensureNoneRemaining())\n608:                     throw new InvalidRecordException(\"Incorrect declared batch size, records still remaining in file\");\n609:             }\n610:             return rec;\n611:         }\n612: \n613:         protected abstract Record readNext(long baseOffset, long baseTimestamp, int baseSequence, Long logAppendTime);\n614: \n615:         protected abstract boolean ensureNoneRemaining();\n616: \n617:         @Override\n618:         public void remove() {\n619:             throw new UnsupportedOperationException();\n620:         }\n621: \n622:     }\n623: \n624:     // visible for testing\n625:     abstract class StreamRecordIterator extends RecordIterator {\n626:         private final InputStream inputStream;\n627: \n628:         StreamRecordIterator(InputStream inputStream) {\n629:             super();\n630:             this.inputStream = inputStream;\n631:         }\n632: \n633:         abstract Record doReadRecord(long baseOffset, long baseTimestamp, int baseSequence, Long logAppendTime) throws IOException;\n634: \n635:         @Override\n636:         protected Record readNext(long baseOffset, long baseTimestamp, int baseSequence, Long logAppendTime) {\n637:             try {\n638:                 return doReadRecord(baseOffset, baseTimestamp, baseSequence, logAppendTime);\n639:             } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {\n640:                 throw new InvalidRecordException(\"Incorrect declared batch size, premature EOF reached\", e);\n641:             } catch (IOException e) {\n642:                 throw new KafkaException(\"Failed to decompress record stream\", e);\n643:             }\n644:         }\n645: \n646:         @Override\n647:         protected boolean ensureNoneRemaining() {\n648:             try {\n649:                 return inputStream.read() == -1;\n650:             } catch (IOException e) {\n651:                 throw new KafkaException(\"Error checking for remaining bytes after reading batch\", e);\n652:             }\n653:         }\n654: \n655:         @Override\n656:         public void close() {\n657:             try {\n658:                 inputStream.close();\n659:             } catch (IOException e) {\n660:                 throw new KafkaException(\"Failed to close record stream\", e);\n661:             }\n662:         }\n663:     }\n664: \n665:     static class DefaultFileChannelRecordBatch extends FileLogInputStream.FileChannelRecordBatch {\n666: \n667:         DefaultFileChannelRecordBatch(long offset,\n668:                                       byte magic,\n669:                                       FileRecords fileRecords,\n670:                                       int position,\n671:                                       int batchSize) {\n672:             super(offset, magic, fileRecords, position, batchSize);\n673:         }\n674: \n675:         @Override\n676:         protected RecordBatch toMemoryRecordBatch(ByteBuffer buffer) {\n677:             return new DefaultRecordBatch(buffer);\n678:         }\n679: \n680:         @Override\n681:         public long baseOffset() {\n682:             return offset;\n683:         }\n684: \n685:         @Override\n686:         public long lastOffset() {\n687:             return loadBatchHeader().lastOffset();\n688:         }\n689: \n690:         @Override\n691:         public long producerId() {\n692:             return loadBatchHeader().producerId();\n693:         }\n694: \n695:         @Override\n696:         public short producerEpoch() {\n697:             return loadBatchHeader().producerEpoch();\n698:         }\n699: \n700:         @Override\n701:         public int baseSequence() {\n702:             return loadBatchHeader().baseSequence();\n703:         }\n704: \n705:         @Override\n706:         public int lastSequence() {\n707:             return loadBatchHeader().lastSequence();\n708:         }\n709: \n710:         @Override\n711:         public Integer countOrNull() {\n712:             return loadBatchHeader().countOrNull();\n713:         }\n714: \n715:         @Override\n716:         public boolean isTransactional() {\n717:             return loadBatchHeader().isTransactional();\n718:         }\n719: \n720:         @Override\n721:         public OptionalLong deleteHorizonMs() {\n722:             return loadBatchHeader().deleteHorizonMs();\n723:         }\n724: \n725:         @Override\n726:         public boolean isControlBatch() {\n727:             return loadBatchHeader().isControlBatch();\n728:         }\n729: \n730:         @Override\n731:         public int partitionLeaderEpoch() {\n732:             return loadBatchHeader().partitionLeaderEpoch();\n733:         }\n734: \n735:         @Override\n736:         protected int headerSize() {\n737:             return RECORD_BATCH_OVERHEAD;\n738:         }\n739:     }\n740: \n741: }\n742: ",
